ModMetaData.name: Abyssal Protocol
ModMetaData.author: Neversalimus
ModMetaData.description:
A techno-demonic RimWorld endgame mod built around controlled summoning, abyssal progression, hostile ritual encounters, and boss-oriented reward escalation.
Current public state: Pre-Alpha / First Vertical Slice.
The repository already contains a real playable foundation of the mod's identity: - Abyssal Summoning Circle and Abyssal Forge - early research, ritual crafting, Abyssal Residue, and Archon Sigil progression - powered summon infrastructure and custom summon pipeline code - portal-based escalation content and hostile abyssal entities - first boss vertical slice with Archon Beast encounter content - early abyssal weapons, implants, Herald content, and Rupture Crown systems - custom code, textures, sound assets, patches, and EN/RU localization
Abyssal Protocol is not trying to be "just another strong faction" or a generic demon pack. The goal is a deliberate infernal-tech loop: unlock forbidden infrastructure, prepare ritual components, summon controlled hostile encounters, survive them, and convert the rewards into deeper progression.
The mod is not content-complete yet. Broader multi-tier progression, more rituals, more enemies and bosses, wider gear coverage, and stronger endgame reward structure are still in active development.
